mission.title: atlantis: Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching when_modified patterns have changed
mission.description: Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching when_modified patterns have changed. This issue affects 23+ users.

steps.title: Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review atlantis configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
### Community Note

* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files matching…
steps.description:
Modified `server/events/plan_command_runner.go` to clear pending status even when silence flags are enabled:
```yaml
repos:
- id: github.com/xxxx/monorepo
  apply_requirements: [mergeable]
  allowed_overrides: [workflow]
```

steps.title: Confirm Atlantis runs plans on PRs even when no files… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Modified `server/events/plan_command_runner.go` to clear pending status even when silence flags are enabled:
codeSnippets:
ATLANTIS_SILENCE_VCS_STATUS_NO_PLANS = true
ATLANTIS_SILENCE_VCS_STATUS_NO_PROJECTS = true
ATLANTIS_SILENCE_NO_PROJECTS = true
ATLANTIS_HIDE_PREV_PLAN_COMMENTS = true
ATLANTIS_HIDE_UNCHANGED_PLAN_COMMENTS = true

version: 3
projects:
- name: 6-app-test-sandbox
  dir: infrastructure-gcp/6-app-test/environments/sandbox
  autoplan:
    when_modified:
    - '*.tf'
    - ../../modules/**/*.tf
    - ../../6-app-modules/**/*.tf
    - '**/*.tfvars'
    - ../../config/**/*.yaml
    - ../../modules/**/*.yaml
  workspace: default
  workflow: default
  terraform_version: v1.6.3

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible.
